summary: Meridian Home Equity readiness pack benchmarked as documentation-only with open evidence gaps.
strengths: Core methodology and governance narrative are present.
A sample extract supports limited data profiling.
gaps: Feature counts differ between methodology and model card.
Reason-code mapping omits several resilience variables.
Monitoring proposal refers to runtime evidence that is not present in the package.
evidence_requests: Provide runnable implementation or reproducibility scripts.
Refresh reason-code mapping for omitted features.
Provide monitoring evidence with explicit thresholds.
